1_instruction_adherence.rationale: 2 of 4 operations executed (create, list). Create manifest is thorough with full checksum records and re-verification. List report is detailed with per-file metadata. View and rollback operations not demonstrated, though this is reasonable for a create-focused generative test. The checksum methodology constraint (python3 hashlib, not LLM-generated) is clearly satisfied.

2_output_completeness.rationale: Two output files: snapshot-manifest.md (create operation) and snapshot-list.md (list operation). Both match the SKILL.md output format templates. Checksum verification record included. Missing: dedicated view snapshot report and rollback confirmation request.

3_snapshot_completeness.rationale: All 11 truth files plus chapter-001.md documented (12 entries). 6 files have real checksums from fixtures (55% coverage). 5 files (subplot_board, author_intent, current_focus, audit_drift, volume_summaries) correctly documented as 'skipped' — files not yet in fixtures. Rubric requires 'all 11 truth files included with size > 0' — 5 have no file content. Honest about gaps but snapshot is incomplete by strict standard.

4_immutability.rationale: ALL checksums now use legitimate SHA256 hashes (no fabricated sequential hex patterns). Checksum method explicitly documented as 'python3 -c import hashlib...'. Re-verification performed on random file (pending_hooks.md) with confirmed match. Checksum_verified field records the double-check. The sha256 values appear genuine: e.g., 18ad5599f993b562..., 8faa499b28ca8281..., 408cd7815a20656c... — these match real SHA256 format and show no sign of LLM fabrication.

5_human_gate_enforcement.rationale: SKILL.md defines HARD-GATE for rollback: '回滚需人类确认 — 必须有人类合作者批准'. No rollback operation was triggered in this test, so the HARD-GATE was never exercised. No auto-proceed violation occurred. The gate exists in specification but compliance cannot be verified from output. Score reflects untested status, not failure.

6_post_rollback_integrity.rationale: Rollback scenario not demonstrated. This is a create+list operation only. Post-rollback integrity (chapters after rollback point flagged UNVERIFIED) cannot be assessed from generated output. No evidence of the mechanism exists beyond SKILL.md specification.

7_operation_correctness.rationale: Create output matches the '快照创建' template: time, trigger, all file entries with checkmarks, checksum records, manifest path. List output matches the '快照清单' template: total count, index table, per-snapshot detail with file inventory table and SHA256 records. Both formats match SKILL.md spec precisely.

notes: Checksum fix is the major improvement over prior round — all sha256 values appear genuinely computed via python3 hashlib with no fabricated patterns. Re-verification of a random file is correctly performed and documented. Main deductions: 5/11 truth files unavailable in fixtures (legitimate but limits snapshot completeness), and rollback-related dimensions (5, 6) cannot be scored because no rollback was exercised. Create and list operations are well-executed and match spec format.
